# ntfy_user (Resource)

Manages an ntfy user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ntfy_user" "example" {
  username = "myuser"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) The username for the ntfy user.

### Optional

- `tier` (String) The tier to assign to the user. Tiers control rate limits and storage quotas. Leave empty for the default tier.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this user (same as username).
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The auto-generated password for the ntfy user.
- `role` (String) The role of the user (user or admin).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ntfy_user.example myuser
```
